creator: horia@racoviceanu.com
text:
I'd like to get all interested parties into one thread, if possible:
Bug 208109, Bug 188181, Jean and never.

MariaDB Cluster https://downloads.mariadb.org/mariadb-galera/

Percona Cluster https://www.percona.com/software/mysql-database/percona-xtradb-cluster

MySQL+WSREP http://galeracluster.com/downloads/

We can have new ports or modify the current ones to use the above sources.
They can function as a normal server when WSREP is disabled from config.
